## Data Fields Available

What financial and organizational data does this registry provide?

- [ ] Organization name and address
- [ ] Registration/tax ID number
- [ ] Founding date
- [ ] Sector/category
- [ ] Leadership/board information
- [ ] Annual revenue
- [ ] Annual expenses
- [ ] Financial statements
- [ ] Annual reports
- [ ] Audit information
- [ ] Website/contact
- [ ] Other:

## Why This Matters

- **Geographic Gap:** What region/country does this fill?
- **Coverage:** What organizations does it reach that OpenGive doesn't?
- **Use Cases:** Who would benefit from this data?

## Known Limitations

- Data quality issues
- Lag time in reporting
- Limited fields
- Geographic/sector limitations
- License restrictions
- Other:

## License & Accessibility

**License:** (CC0, CC-BY, Open Data Commons, Proprietary, etc.)

**Terms of Use:** (link)

**Accessibility:**
- [ ] Completely free and open
- [ ] Free with attribution
- [ ] Free with registration
- [ ] Paid access
- [ ] Other restrictions:

## Technical Feasibility

**Difficulty Level:**
- [ ] Easy (REST API, well-documented, straightforward data)
- [ ] Medium (Some scraping, incomplete documentation)
- [ ] Hard (Complex scraping, OCR needed, frequent format changes)
- [ ] Very Hard (Heavy lifting, special tools needed)

**Implementation Effort Estimate:** (hours/days)

**Notes:**

## Implementation Plan

If you're willing to help implement this source:

- [ ] I can research and prototype the scraper/parser
- [ ] I can write and maintain code
- [ ] I can provide testing and validation
- [ ] I need help with implementation

**Github Username:** (if offering to help)

## Additional Resources

- Links to similar implementations
- Academic research on this registry
- Articles about data quality
- Community discussions or requests

## Checklist

- [ ] I have researched the registry thoroughly
- [ ] The data is publicly accessible
- [ ] License allows OpenGive to aggregate and share data
- [ ] This data is not already covered by a Priority 1 source
- [ ] I understand this requires community effort to implement
